title: Nursery Rhyme. CI. Proverbs.
content:
He that goes to see his wheat in May,
        Comes weeping away.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Unknown, titled "Nursery Rhyme. CI. Proverbs.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
